pr_title: SDLC-33: Fix business-class seat-type mapping for window preferences
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix business-class seat-type classification so window preferences are assigned to true window seats.

## What changed
- Corrected `_seat_type_for` business-cabin mapping in `backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py`
- Ensured columns A and D are treated as `window`
- Ensured columns B and C are treated as `aisle`
- Added/updated tests to cover business-class seat mapping and preference assignment

## Why
Passengers requesting a window seat in business class were being assigned a center/incorrect seat due to reversed seat-type labels.

## Validation
- Targeted seat inventory tests
- Business-class window preference assignment tests

## Risk
Low: localized fix to seat classification logic only.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
